facts.dispatch.branch: match_arm.value -> RustMatchArmFact(span, line, lines) -> Fact(payload.lines, span, line)
facts.name.binding: let_declaration.pattern identifiers -> RustNameFact(kind:binding, span, line) -> Fact(payload.name, payload.kind, payload.issue_kind, span, line)
facts.name.function: function_item.name -> RustNameFact(kind:function, span, line) -> Fact(payload.name, payload.kind, payload.issue_kind, span, line)
facts.name.method: function_item.name inside impl_item -> RustNameFact(kind:method, span, line) -> Fact(payload.name, payload.kind, payload.issue_kind, span, line)
facts.name.parameter: parameter.pattern identifiers -> RustNameFact(kind:parameter, span, line) -> Fact(payload.name, payload.kind, payload.issue_kind, span, line)
facts.name.trait_signature: function_signature_item.name inside trait_item -> RustNameFact(kind:method, span, line) -> Fact(payload.name, payload.kind, payload.issue_kind, span, line)
facts.shape.repeated_token_pattern: raw CST normalized token subtree hash exceeds repeated structure budget -> RustRepeatedTokenPatternFact(span, line, occurrences, total_lines, token_count, node_kind, depth) -> Fact(payload.occurrences, payload.total_lines, payload.token_count, payload.node_kind, payload.depth, span, line)
facts.test.attribute: attribute_item text contains test -> RustTestAttributeFact(span, line) -> Fact(span, line)

recovery.rule.continuation: facts may emit when recoverable nodes are outside queried ranges
